MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

Effective Date: January 1, 2025
Between: Acme Corp ("Client") and Contractor LLC ("Provider")

1. TERM AND RENEWAL
This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for an initial term of 36 months. This Agreement shall automatically renew for successive 12-month periods without prior written notice to Provider. Only Client may terminate this Agreement.

2. LIABILITY
Provider assumes unlimited liability for all direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, and punitive damages arising from or related to the services, regardless of cause or fault. Client's liability shall not exceed $100 in aggregate.

3. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All intellectual property created, conceived, or developed by Provider, including any pre-existing intellectual property, proprietary tools, frameworks, and methodologies that Provider brings to the engagement, shall be the sole and exclusive property of Client upon creation, without additional compensation.

4. TERMINATION
Client may terminate this Agreement at any time for any reason with 30 days written notice. Provider may only terminate this Agreement with 24 months prior written notice and only for material breach that remains uncured for 180 days after written notice.

5. NON-COMPETE
For a period of 5 years following termination, Provider shall not directly or indirectly engage in, consult for, or have any interest in any business that competes with Client in any market, geographic region, or industry worldwide.

6. GOVERNING LAW
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of a jurisdiction to be determined at Client's sole discretion at the time any dispute arises.

7. SERVICE LEVELS
Provider shall deliver services in a timely and professional manner consistent with general industry standards. No specific metrics, uptime guarantees, response times, or penalties for failure to meet service levels are defined.

8. INDEMNIFICATION
Provider shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Client from any and all claims, damages, losses, and expenses, including those arising from Client's own negligence, willful misconduct, or breach of this Agreement.
